mdeDeviceId.description: A unique identifier assigned to a device by Microsoft Defender for Endpoint.

registryHive.description: Registry hive of the key that the recorded action was applied to.

registryKey.description: Registry key that the recorded action was applied to.

registryValue.description: Data of the registry value that the recorded action was applied to.

registryValueName.description: Name of the registry value that the recorded action was applied to.

registryValueType.description: Data type, such as binary or string, of the registry value that the recorded action was applied to.
